title: Online Reselling Business
description: Buy wholesale goods (clothing, electronics) and resell them on platforms like Meesho or Amazon.

title: Handmade Jewelry Store
description: Design and sell custom terracotta, bead, or polymer clay jewelry online via Instagram/WhatsApp.

title: Mobile Repair Shop
description: Offer smartphone screen replacements, battery fixes, and software troubleshooting.

title: 3D Printing Services
description: Offer rapid prototyping and custom 3D printed parts for local engineering firms, students, and hobbyists.

title: DJ & Sound Rental
description: Rent DJ equipment, speakers, and lights for events and parties.

title: Cloud Kitchen
description: Operate a delivery-only commercial kitchen specifically optimized for Swiggy/Zomato orders.

title: Tuition Center
description: Start an after-school tutoring center for local students (classes 1-10) focusing on core subjects.

title: Organic Fertilizer Production
description: Produce vermicompost or organic manure from organic waste and sell to local farmers and nurseries.

title: Yoga/Fitness Coaching
description: Provide online and offline personal training or group yoga sessions.

title: Bike Rental Service
description: Rent bikes to tourists, students, and daily commuters. Start with 3-5 bikes.

title: Home Cleaning Service
description: Professional cleaning for homes, offices, and post-construction sites.

title: Packer & Mover Service
description: Help families relocate within city or inter-city with packing and transport.

title: Event Planning Service
description: Plan weddings, birthdays, and corporate events. Start small, scale to full coordination.

title: Food Truck Business
description: Mobile kitchen serving street food, burgers, or regional cuisine.

title: Masala & Spice Grinding
description: Grind and pack fresh spices for local markets and kirana stores.

title: Freelance Web Development
description: Build websites for small businesses using WordPress, Next.js, or Shopify.

title: Home-Based Tiffin Service
description: Prepare and deliver home-cooked meals to working professionals and students in your area.

title: Mushroom Farming
description: Grow oyster or button mushrooms in small space. High demand from hotels.

title: Last-Mile Delivery Service
description: Partner with Amazon/Flipkart or local e-commerce for package delivery in your area.

title: Interior Design Consultancy
description: Design home and office interiors. Start with 3D renders, scale to full execution.

title: Digital Marketing Agency
description: Provide SEO, social media management, and paid ads services to local small businesses.

title: Photography Business
description: Cover weddings, portraits, product shoots, and real estate photography.

title: Dropshipping Store
description: Sell products online without inventory. Supplier ships directly to customer.

title: Bakery & Cake Shop
description: Fresh bread, pastries, and custom birthday/wedding cakes.

title: Cyber Cafe & Printing
description: Internet, printing, photocopy, and form filling. Still in demand in Tier 2/3 cities.
